content.en:
With the help of the Chaos Black Lotus, Ye Tian successfully entered the heart position of the Silver Horn Ancestral God.

Suddenly, a terrifying bloodline energy rushed in, and this bloodline energy came from the heart of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, and there was a huge gap in its heart position.

Some bloodline crystals can be seen from the notch!

"That'...... It should be the blood of the ancestral god that the Lord of Cangyu said!" Ye Tian muttered: "The Lord of Cangyu said that the blood of the ancestral god is not a blood state, but a crystal state. The reason why it is in a crystal state is because the crystal state is not easy to emit energy, if it exists in a blood state, the energy of the blood of the ancestral god will be dissipated in a long time, which is also a self-protection measure for the blood of the ancestral god!"

There are not many blood crystals of the ancestral gods in the heart of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, and most of them exist in the depths, presumably because the three masters are difficult to penetrate into the depths of the heart, and only dare to take the blood of the ancestral gods in the area at the edge of the heart, plus some of the blood of the ancestral gods outside has been consumed, so only the blood of these ancestral gods is left.

"The blood of these ancestral gods, enough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he flew into the depths of the heart of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, but at this time, his body was almost at the limit, and his whole body was cracking, after all, the energy in this heart was being released all the time, and the Supremes would converge the energy, so he could stand beside the Supremes, but it was difficult to withstand the pressure here.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian immediately picked up one ancestral god's blood one after another at the fastest speed.

In a moment's time, Ye Tian obtained twenty Ancestral God Blood Crystals.

As for the flesh and blood in the deepest part of the heart, there was still a small amount of ancestral god's blood hidden, but Ye Tian couldn't get it.

Even without this terrifying coercion, he would not be able to cut through the flesh blessed by the supreme power.

The physical strength of this ancestral god is indeed not strong, but the supreme power is not exhausted, which is equivalent to blessing the defense, and he has no way to break through the defense.

Therefore, he could not help the flesh barrier at the heart.

"The ancestral gods are really a group of special innate gods, if they are ordinary supremes, they can't maintain such energy at all, and they will long be exhausted of energy, and only physical energy is left! It's a pity that no matter how good the talent and strength of the ancestral god is, his nature is to kill, and the race that can't maintain his heart will eventually perish!"

Ye Tian sighed.

After obtaining twenty blood crystals of the ancestral gods, Ye Tian left here.

However, with the loss of twenty Ancestral Divine Blood Crystals, the aura of the Silver Horn Ancestral God weakened slightly, and the Holy Land space shook.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian realized that something was wrong.

No matter how powerful the perception of the masters is, the changes here must not be hidden from the three masters.

Even the weakest master can know the situation here.

What's more, this is also the tomb of the ancestral gods, the territory of those congenital blood.

......

Temple of the Ancestors.

The three Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons were originally in retreat and cultivating, but suddenly opened their eyes one by one.

"There is something unusual in the Holy Land!"

Whew!!

The divine consciousness of the three masters penetrated through the void and came to the Holy Land to perceive the situation in the Holy Land.

For the first time, they found Ye Tian's traces.

"A tribesman has broken into the Holy Land, causing the weakening of the Holy Land, seize him!"

They didn't detect Ye Tian's identity at the first time, thinking that Ye Tian in disguise was a congenital blood, but as long as he fought, Ye Tian's identity would still be exposed.

Swish!!!!

One of the Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons rushed out of the Ancestral God Temple and went to Ye Tian's location, while the other two Master-level Innate Blood Sons did not leave the Ancestral God Temple, because guarding the Ancestral God Temple was equally important and could not leave without permission.

Moreover, with only one galaxy-level peak innate blood son, they didn't think that they needed to use three masters, and just one master was extremely important.

If it weren't for the seriousness of this matter, they wouldn't even make a move, they would only let the cosmic god's innate blood make a move.

---------

"It's just a Dominant-level Innate Blood Son, it seems that he doesn't pay enough attention to me!"

Ye Tian sneered.

Swish!

He sped up to fly, he didn't want to make a move with the Dominator-level Innate Blood.

Although he is not afraid, it is difficult to kill a master.

The cosmic god and the master are two realms, no matter how weak the master is, it is difficult to kill, he is confident to kill any cosmic god, but he can't kill a master, he can only seal and suppress, after all, the biological recovery power of the master at this level is very terrifying, and the defense power is also very perverted, plus the power of the master crushes the general power.

Therefore, Ye Tian was reluctant to fight with a master.

......

"It's such a fast speed, is this still an innate bloodchild at the peak of the galaxy level?"

The Dominant-level Innate Blood Son was shocked.

Judging from Ye Tian's speed, this is not an ordinary innate blood at all!

And although there are a lot of innate blood children, there are only a few excellent ones, and he basically knows them, and there is definitely no innate blood child like Ye Tian among them.

And the innate blood son will not run away at all, but Ye Tian is running away!

That's right, he was sure that Ye Tian was running away and had already discovered his existence!

"You can't escape!"

The Dominator-level Innate Blood Son sped up his speed and pursued Ye Tian with all his strength.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to catch up.

His combat power is very rebellious, but his speed can't be too rebellious, so it still can't be compared to the speed of a Dominant-level innate blood.

"As a galaxy-level innate blood, if you dare to trespass on the Holy Land, and make the Holy Land weak, you should be punished!"

The Dominant-level Innate Blood Son made a move and grabbed Ye Tian, but judging from the degree of his attack, it seemed that he was not ready to kill Ye Tian, but was ready to catch Ye Tian.

"The attack power is too weak!"

Ye Tian said.

Rumble!!!!

The Dominator-level Innate Blood Son was slashed out by Ye Tian, and although he was not injured much, he was extremely angry.

He was a dignified master, one of the three masters of the Tomb of the Ancestral God, and he was actually knocked away by a galaxy, and he couldn't tolerate such a thing.

"You must die!"

The Dominator-level Innate Blood Son shot out angrily, and he no longer had any reservations.

And Ye Tian almost shot with all his might, but while fighting, he moved towards the exit of the Tomb of the Ancestral God.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian's battle with the Dominator-level Innate Blood Son shook the Tomb of the Ancestral God, but the other two Masters in the Ancestral God Hall were suppressed.

"How can this be, it's just a galaxy-level innate blood, how can it have such terrifying power!!! even if the ancestral god is resurrected, it can't be so against the sky!"

"Stupid, that guy is not an innate blood son at all, he doesn't have the power aura of an innate blood child at all, but a completely different level of strength. Yes, it's the breath of those nasty guys from the outside world, and he's from the outside world!"

"Damn, the guy from the outside world is disguised as our innate blood, and he has entered the Holy Land, he must be killed, he must not be allowed to escape, we will also go to help, with the power of our three masters, we can definitely kill him!"

Rushing!!!

The two masters of the Ancestral God Temple also rushed out of the Ancestral God Temple and went to the place of battle, preparing to besiege Ye Tian.
